aeo_readiness.summary: The business has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup and localized content, but lacks depth in content, reviews, and technical optimizations.
quick_wins: Generate and showcase customer reviews to build trust and improve local search presence.
Expand service pages with more detailed, keyword-rich content to target specific restoration services.
Optimize meta tags and headers with location-specific keywords (e.g., 'Eden Prairie MN').

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes a 'Service Area' section but lacks detailed geographic information and localized content.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has some local signals but needs to enhance its geographic targeting and local SEO efforts.
critical_issues: No Google Business Profile (GBP) found, which is crucial for local search visibility.
Lack of localized content beyond the main service area mention.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent or missing Name, Address, Phone (NAP) citations across the web.
action_items: Create and verify a Google Business Profile with accurate NAP information.
Audit and update NAP citations on major directories (e.g., Yelp, Yellow Pages) to ensure consistency.
Leverage local citation services to build additional high-quality citations.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and authority.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for local restoration services due to weak local SEO and GBP absence.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and optimizing for local search terms.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, informative content (e.g., blog posts, case studies) to establish the business as an expert in the restoration field.
